name: Home Assistant
description: Home automation that puts local control & privacy first
compose:
name: slashnode-home-assistant
services:
  server:
    image: homeassistant/home-assistant:2026.6.4
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    privileged: true
    network_mode: host
    volumes:
      - server_data:/config
      - server_shared-data-storage-downloads:/media
      - /dev:/dev
      - /run/dbus:/run/dbus:ro
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-home-assistant_server_data
  server_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-home-assistant_server_shared-data-storage-downloads
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (home-assistant). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://home-assistant.io. ⚠️ SECURITY: server: runs privileged; server: host network mode — bypasses Caddy/Tor isolation, binds host interfaces directly.
